treatment_information.specific_treatment: Total thyroidectomy and removal of left lower parathyroid adenoma with auto transplant
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Coumadin maintained during surgery with INR of 2

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with large goiter and primary hyperparathyroidism
Patient kept on Coumadin due to lupus coagulant factor
Surgery performed: total thyroidectomy and parathyroid adenoma removal

patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Mental Status: Clear and coherent. Level of Consciousness: Alert and interactive.
